subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! The letter thou didst address to Jinab-i-Siyyid Taqi hath been received, bringing joy and delight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان نامه که بجناب سید تقی مرقوم نموده بودید رسید سبب روح و ریحان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement
